← back to Quality Control Centre

Research Report Progress
Standalone view →Updated 18 Jun 2026, 02:00 (UK time)

Live status of every research report being produced automatically. Each report is requested, sent to AlphaSense, downloaded, highlighted, and published to the website.

Being worked on now: 199Waiting in queue: 0AlphaSense capacity: 0 of 3Finished in last 7 days: 587Stuck: 199Problems: 34
Needs attentionWhat do I do? ▾
🟢 Green — no action needed; Watson is handling it.
🟡 Yellow — Watson is retrying automatically; check back in 2–4 hours.
🔴 Red — needs a look; message CoS or check the pipeline log.

    Bilia (BILI.A-SE) — Summary Tearsheet
    Severity
    Red — needs attention
    Problem
    Stuck at "Putting it on the website" for 2.2 days with no progress.

    SOP-correct: watcher will pick this up at the next scheduled run.
